item.title: 100 kg down in a year!
item.description: Just checking this one off the list, I lost 100 kg (220 lb) in the last year, and I've been looking forward to posting the progress pictures here so here they are! Video of the year if you're interested https://youtu.be/hcmIrI9AQuQ Edit: Wow, I went out for a bike ride and came back to many comments to read through! Thank you for your lovely comments, you are all so sweet. Answers to some reoccurring questions: Q: How in the fuck!? A: I wish I had a secret trick I could tell you but honestly, I just had a really long and really shitty year. I exercise A LOT now, like I just went for a four-hour bike ride, so finding workouts that I really enjoy has helped immensely. Most of it though is probably from being very strict with my diet which I fucking hated. I was very angry for a lot of the year because it just sucks! Q: Why? A: I was so unhealthy I needed to do something, or I was probably going to die of a heart attack or something. I also want to be around and healthy and a good influence for my son. Q: Surgery? A: Not so far, just diet, exercise, and spite! I might get some of the excess skin removed though.
item.dc:creator: JeanLucguizamos

item.title: Cheesy Beef Taco Pasta
item.description: Cheesy Beef Taco Pasta Ingredients 1 lb ground beef Salt and pepper, to taste 1 packet taco seasoning (or 2 tablespoons homemade taco seasoning) 1 can (10 oz) diced tomatoes with green chilies (like Rotel) 2 cups beef broth 2 cups uncooked pasta (such as rotini or penne) 1 cup shredded cheddar cheese 1/2 cup shredded Monterey Jack cheese (or additional cheddar) Fresh cilantro or green onions, chopped, for garnish (optional) Instructions Cook the Ground Beef: In a large skillet, brown the ground beef over medium-high heat, breaking it up as it cooks. Season with a little salt and pepper. Drain any excess fat. Add Taco Flavor: Sprinkle the taco seasoning over the browned beef and stir to coat. Add the diced tomatoes with green chilies, beef broth, and uncooked pasta. Stir to combine. Simmer the Pasta: Bring the mixture to a simmer, then cover and reduce the heat to low. Cook for about 12-15 minutes, or until the pasta is tender and most of the liquid has been absorbed, stirring occasionally. Add the Cheese: Turn off the heat and stir in the shredded cheddar and Monterey Jack cheese until melted and creamy. Garnish and Serve: Garnish with chopped cilantro or green onions if desired, and serve warm. Tips Extra Creaminess: Add a dollop of sour cream before serving for extra creaminess. Spice It Up: For more heat, add diced jalapeños or a dash of hot sauce. This Cheesy Beef Taco Pasta is a quick and delicious dinner with the perfect kick of taco flavor!
item.dc:creator: TheRainbowegoSweet007

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
kinda a flying v?
that's impressive
run away
please don't
hot stuff comin through
coolest slug of all time?
no need to brag
i have questions
looks like face drugs
mmm hmm
action packed
we've all been there
as is tradition
ready for fisticuffs
i guess
he's a good man.. and thorough
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: Costasiella is a genus of sacoglossan sea slugs, a shell-less marine opisthobranchid gastropod mollusk in the family Costasiellidae.
item.dc:creator: ArcadesCinza

item.title: This is the brave face of true resistance.
item.description: In Iran, a woman who was accosted by the “morality police” for not wearing hijab removes her clothing & roams the streets in defiance. She has since been arrested by IRGC forces and forcibly disappeared. This is the brave face of true resistance. From Elica Le Bon @elicalebon
item.dc:creator: online367

item.title: Soon We'll Know Whether the USA Voters Have Passed Their IQ Test
item.description: CONTENT CONTROLS “Content Controls will allow you to see fewer posts from certain topics or tags while you browse Imgur.” https://help.imgur.com/hc/en-us/articles/26509094934171-Content-Controls Political Cartoons https://stopproject2025comic.org/#comic-art “The Washington Post Response to being Unable to Endorse Kamala Harris because of Jeff Bezos” https://imgur.com/gallery/washington-post-response-to-being-unable-to-endorse-kamala-harris-because-of-jeff-bezos-vtxIs9a Bernie Sanders explaining why he's voting for Kamala Harris even though he vehemently disagrees with the way she’s (and Biden’s) handling Israel/Palestine: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Vf5MThSniiY Dave Bautista explains why Donald Trump is a "whiny b!@#&!" “He wears more makeup than Dolly Parton.” https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=f1LMC9sPVWY Caitlin Kraus: “This Body” “A song for the rights of all: the right to be safe in our bodies, the right to make decisions for our bodies, and the right to be who we are in our bodies. I wrote this song out of the need to process my anger at women’s rights being taken away and for what this means for other rights down the line. A never-ending issue it seems, but one we can’t stop fighting for.” https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EW9Kp-P3oio&t=4s Republicans In Your Bedroom - Part 2 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xS5wm5cEt6g USAmericans: Remember that this election is not just for President. Many blue politicians and blue issues need your vote even if pundits think they know which candidate will get your state’s Electoral College votes. CHECK OUT Download Project 2025: https://www.documentcloud.org/documents/24088042-project-2025s-mandate-for-leadership-the-conservative-promise THE PEOPLE’S GUIDE TO PROJECT 2025 https://democracyforward.org/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/2024-05_Peoples-Guide-Pro-2025.pdf Progress Action Fund: “Republicans Killing Your Wife https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=phGyOt58lV8 Progress Action Fund: “Republicans In Your Bedroom - Part 2 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xS5wm5cEt6g Progress Action Fund: “GOD: Grand Old Perverts.” https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BtBenbuY0Wk Progress Action Fund: Not Authorized By Any Candidate or Candidate Committee. www.progressactionfund.com Progress Action Fund: “Keep Republicans Out of Your Bedroom.” Paid for by PAF. www.progressactionfund.com Not Authorized By Any Candidate or Candidate Committee. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=z10j_H7zOb8 Progress Action Fund: “Republicans Watching Your Daughter.” Paid for by PAF. www.progressactionfund.com Not Authorized By Any Candidate or Candidate Committee. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oHSXrtv_1RI Progress Action Fund: https://www.youtube.com/@progressactionfund945 https://progressactionfund.com Republican Voters Against Trump: https://www.youtube.com/@RepublicanVotersAgainstTrump “I tried to push him, he kept coming back” — Natasha shares her account of being assaulted by Trump. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yFlTJjR2JC4 The Local Girls: “Shout Sister Shout” https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zYOSr-mwi0U The Local Girls: “It’s Not Too Late” https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SYnFPMjWF58 Vote BLUE the whole ballot through. Remember to: • Confirm your state’s requirements & voting dates/times -- early voting is often easier than Election Day • Recheck registration before your registration deadline “Harris’ Plan To Raise the Minimum Wage and Eliminate Tax on Tips Would Benefit Service and Hospitality Workers “Crucially, the vice president’s proposal would provide guardrails to keep the policy aimed at low-paid workers, in contrast to Trump’s plan, which would allow the wealthy to skirt taxes.” https://www.americanprogressaction.org/article/harris-plan-to-raise-the-minimum-wage-and-eliminate-tax-on-tips-would-benefit-service-and-hospitality-workers/ Download Project 2025: https://www.documentcloud.org/documents/24088042-project-2025s-mandate-for-leadership-the-conservative-promise
